title: Skim — Fast, Open-Source AI Email Client for Windows
excerpt: A fast, native, minimalist email client for Windows with an AI copilot on your own terms. Free & open source, ~5 MB, no admin rights.
content_html:
Skim
Features AI Install FAQ GitHub

// FREE · OPEN SOURCE · ~5MB · WINDOWS · BYOK //

A free AI email client for Windows that doesn't suck (that hard)

— from the diary, ~2 a.m.

Minimalist, native, fast. BYOK for the AI assistant and co-writer. No subscriptions — free forever. Open source.

Free & open source · ~5 MB installer · no admin rights · grab Skim_x.y.z_x64-setup.exe

▶ watch it move

Fewer buttons. Less pain.

Email clients usually come in two flavors: a browser cosplaying as an app, or a monstrous do-everything suite with ICQ-era vibes. Skim is neither.

Native, not Chromium

A Rust core with a system WebView2 UI — no bundled browser like Electron. The installer is a few megabytes, cold start is instant, idle memory is modest. Installs without admin rights.

We cut half the features. On purpose.

No calendar, no contacts manager, no rules, no filters, no snooze — none of the stuff you never actually use anyway. Fewer buttons means less cognitive load means less irritation. Need a do-everything suite? Install Outlook.

Actions show up when you need them

Buttons appear only when they're useful. There's no menu bar at all. Skim's whole job is to surface the right action at the right moment. How well it pulls that off is up for debate — but you can help!

Local and private by default

Mail syncs over IMAP straight into a local SQLite database. It works offline, search is instant (FTS5), and every action applies at once and queues up — Skim catches up when the network returns. Zero telemetry, zero anal probes.

>_ one hotkey to anything

Ctrl+K, and it's already done

One hotkey to anything. Search your mail, jump to any folder, fire quick commands, and ask the AI across your whole mailbox — one window, no mouse.

no mouse required →

Ctrl K palette Ctrl N compose j/k move e archive # delete s star u unread r reply / search

EMAIL'S NOT DEAD.

✦ Your key, your bill

AI that knows it's Thursday and writes like you

There is no “Skim Pro” subscription, and there never will be. Paste your own Anthropic (Claude) or OpenRouter key (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok and hundreds more models) — or point Skim at any OpenAI-compatible endpoint, a local model via Ollama, LM Studio or vLLM included — and the violet ✦ buttons come alive. Requests go straight from your machine to the provider — no proxy of ours, no markup. You pay the provider at cost; the key lives in Windows Credential Manager. No key? Skim just works as a fast email client (not amazing, but why not?).

  • [01]

    Drafts in your voice — tell it what to say and get a finished, first-person email. Skim can analyze up to a hundred of your sent messages and write the way you write: the same greetings, sentence length, punctuation. It replies in the sender's language, even one you don't speak.

  • [02]

    Drafts you refine in dialogue — “shorter”, “add a deadline”, “drop the exclamation marks”. Each tweak lands on the current text, keeping everything you didn't ask to change. Edit by hand and the AI takes that into account too.

  • [03]

    Ask about an email — a question about one message or the whole thread (up to 25 emails in context), with follow-ups. It answers only from the content: if the answer isn't in the conversation, it says so.

  • [04]

    Chat with your whole mailbox — “which invoices are still unpaid this month?” right in the command palette. Skim searches your mail (FTS5/bm25), answers, and cites the source emails as clickable chips.

  • [05]

    AI recap of your unread — one click digests up to 20 unread emails: what needs a reply first, with deadlines and cited sources, newsletters piled off to the side. It marks what it covered as read.

  • [06]

    It knows the context — every prompt carries the current date, weekday, time and your timezone, your interface language, and — where relevant — the entire thread. So “reply that I'll make it by Friday” becomes a concrete date, not an abstraction.

Fork it, break it, repeat

Skim ships under the MIT license — open source you can use however you like. Found a bug or have an idea? Open an issue. Better yet, just send a pull request.

Install in seconds

Download the latest installer — the .exe (NSIS) installs per-user without admin rights; an .msi is published for managed environments. Requires Windows 10/11 with WebView2 (preinstalled on Windows 11).

↓ Get the latest release

Frequently asked questions

Everything people usually ask before switching their Windows email client.

Is this whole thing vibe-coded?

Yeah, obviously. It's 2026 — wake up, samurai! Nobody writes code by hand anymore.

Is Skim free?

Yes. Skim is free and open source under the MIT license — no subscription, no account, no upsell. The AI features are optional and use your own API key, so you pay your AI provider directly at cost.

Which email providers does Skim support?

Gmail (one-click Google sign-in or an app password), Outlook, Yahoo and iCloud via app passwords, and any other mailbox over standard IMAP/SMTP. Server settings are filled in automatically for the big providers.

Does the AI read my email?

Only when you ask it to. AI features stay off until you paste your own key — Anthropic, OpenRouter, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (a local model via Ollama, LM Studio or vLLM included) — and every request goes directly from your machine to the provider, no middleman servers. The key is stored in Windows Credential Manager.

Does Skim run on Windows 10 and Windows 11?

Yes — Skim supports Windows 10 and 11 with WebView2 (preinstalled on Windows 11). The installer is about 5 MB and installs per-user, no admin rights required.

How is Skim different from Outlook or Thunderbird?

Skim is deliberately small: a fast, keyboard-first Windows email client with a native Rust core instead of Electron, offline-first actions, instant local search, and an AI copilot that works with your own key. No calendar, no rules engine, no bloat.

Is my email stored locally?

Yes. Mail syncs over IMAP straight into a local SQLite cache on your device, so Skim works offline and search is instant. There are no Skim servers and zero telemetry.

sentences.en: Ask about an email — a question about one message or the whole thread (up to 25 emails in context), with follow-ups.
sentences.zh: 询问一封电子邮件 - 关于一条消息或整个线程（上下文中最多 25 封电子邮件）的问题，以及后续问题。

sentences.en: It answers only from the content: if the answer isn't in the conversation, it says so.
sentences.zh: 它仅根据内容进行回答：如果答案不在对话中，它就会这么说。

blocks.html_en:
• [04]

    Chat with your whole mailbox — “which invoices are still unpaid this month?” right in the command palette. Skim searches your mail (FTS5/bm25), answers, and cites the source emails as clickable chips.

blocks.html_en:
• [05]

    AI recap of your unread — one click digests up to 20 unread emails: what needs a reply first, with deadlines and cited sources, newsletters piled off to the side. It marks what it covered as read.

sentences.en: [05]AI recap of your unread — one click digests up to 20 unread emails: what needs a reply first, with deadlines and cited sources, newsletters piled off to the side.

blocks.html_en: AI recap of your unread — one click digests up to 20 unread emails: what needs a reply first, with deadlines and cited sources, newsletters piled off to the side. It marks what it covered as read.

sentences.en: AI recap of your unread — one click digests up to 20 unread emails: what needs a reply first, with deadlines and cited sources, newsletters piled off to the side.

blocks.html_en:
• [06]

    It knows the context — every prompt carries the current date, weekday, time and your timezone, your interface language, and — where relevant — the entire thread. So “reply that I'll make it by Friday” becomes a concrete date, not an abstraction.

sentences.en: [06]It knows the context — every prompt carries the current date, weekday, time and your timezone, your interface language, and — where relevant — the entire thread.
sentences.zh: [06]它知道上下文 - 每个提示都包含当前日期、工作日、时间和您的时区、您的界面语言，以及相关的整个线程。

sentences.en: So “reply that I'll make it by Friday” becomes a concrete date, not an abstraction.
sentences.zh: 因此，“回复说我会在周五之前完成”就变成了一个具体的日期，而不是一个抽象的日期。

blocks.html_en: It knows the context — every prompt carries the current date, weekday, time and your timezone, your interface language, and — where relevant — the entire thread. So “reply that I'll make it by Friday” becomes a concrete date, not an abstraction.

sentences.en: It knows the context — every prompt carries the current date, weekday, time and your timezone, your interface language, and — where relevant — the entire thread.

sentences.en: So “reply that I'll make it by Friday” becomes a concrete date, not an abstraction.

blocks.html_en: Fork it, break it, repeat

sentences.en: Fork it, break it, repeat
sentences.zh: 叉它，打破它，重复

blocks.html_en: Skim ships under the MIT license — open source you can use however you like. Found a bug or have an idea? Open an issue. Better yet, just send a pull request.

sentences.en: Skim ships under the MIT license — open source you can use however you like.
sentences.zh: Skim 在 MIT 许可下发布 - 开源，您可以随心所欲地使用。

blocks.html_en: Install in seconds

sentences.en: Install in seconds
sentences.zh: 几秒钟内即可安装

blocks.html_en: Download the latest installer — the .exe (NSIS) installs per-user without admin rights; an .msi is published for managed environments. Requires Windows 10/11 with WebView2 (preinstalled on Windows 11).

sentences.en: Download the latest installer — the .exe (NSIS) installs per-user without admin rights; an .msi is published for managed environments.
sentences.zh: 下载最新的安装程序 — .exe (NSIS) 按用户安装，无需管理员权限； .msi 是针对托管环境发布的。

sentences.en: Requires Windows 10/11 with WebView2 (preinstalled on Windows 11).
sentences.zh: 需要带有 WebView2 的 Windows 10/11（Windows 11 上预装）。

blocks.html_en: ↓ Get the latest release

sentences.en: ↓ Get the latest release
sentences.zh: ↓ 获取最新版本

blocks.html_en: Frequently asked questions

sentences.en: Frequently asked questions
sentences.zh: 常见问题

blocks.html_en: Everything people usually ask before switching their Windows email client.

sentences.en: Everything people usually ask before switching their Windows email client.
sentences.zh: 人们在切换 Windows 电子邮件客户端之前通常会询问的所有问题。

blocks.html_en: Yeah, obviously. It's 2026 — wake up, samurai! Nobody writes code by hand anymore.

sentences.en: Yeah, obviously.
sentences.zh: 是的，显然。

sentences.en: It's 2026 — wake up, samurai!
sentences.zh: 现在是 2026 年——醒醒吧，武士！

sentences.en: Nobody writes code by hand anymore.
sentences.zh: 没有人再手工编写代码了。

blocks.html_en: Yes. Skim is free and open source under the MIT license — no subscription, no account, no upsell. The AI features are optional and use your own API key, so you pay your AI provider directly at cost.

sentences.en: Yes.
sentences.zh: 是的。

sentences.en: Skim is free and open source under the MIT license — no subscription, no account, no upsell.
sentences.zh: Skim 是在 MIT 许可下免费且开源的——无需订阅、无需帐户、无需追加销售。

sentences.en: The AI features are optional and use your own API key, so you pay your AI provider directly at cost.
sentences.zh: AI 功能是可选的，并且使用您自己的 API 密钥，因此您可以直接按成本向 AI 提供商付费。

blocks.html_en: Gmail (one-click Google sign-in or an app password), Outlook, Yahoo and iCloud via app passwords, and any other mailbox over standard IMAP/SMTP. Server settings are filled in automatically for the big providers.

sentences.en: Gmail (one-click Google sign-in or an app password), Outlook, Yahoo and iCloud via app passwords, and any other mailbox over standard IMAP/SMTP.
sentences.zh: Gmail（一键式 Google 登录或应用程序密码）、通过应用程序密码的 Outlook、Yahoo 和 iCloud，以及通过标准 IMAP/SMTP 的任何其他邮箱。

sentences.en: Server settings are filled in automatically for the big providers.
sentences.zh: 大型提供商的服务器设置会自动填写。

blocks.html_en: Only when you ask it to. AI features stay off until you paste your own key — Anthropic, OpenRouter, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (a local model via Ollama, LM Studio or vLLM included) — and every request goes directly from your machine to the provider, no middleman servers. The key is stored in Windows Credential Manager.

sentences.en: Only when you ask it to.
sentences.zh: 仅当您要求时。

sentences.en: AI features stay off until you paste your own key — Anthropic, OpenRouter, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (a local model via Ollama, LM Studio or vLLM included) — and every request goes directly from your machine to the provider, no middleman servers.
sentences.zh: AI 功能将保持关闭状态，直到您粘贴自己的密钥（Anthropic、OpenRouter 或任何 OpenAI 兼容端点（包括通过 Ollama、LM Studio 或 vLLM 的本地模型）），并且每个请求都直接从您的计算机发送到提供商，无需中间人服务器。

sentences.en: The key is stored in Windows Credential Manager.
sentences.zh: 密钥存储在 Windows 凭据管理器中。

blocks.html_en: Yes — Skim supports Windows 10 and 11 with WebView2 (preinstalled on Windows 11). The installer is about 5 MB and installs per-user, no admin rights required.

sentences.en: Yes — Skim supports Windows 10 and 11 with WebView2 (preinstalled on Windows 11).
sentences.zh: 是 - Skim 支持带有 WebView2 的 Windows 10 和 11（Windows 11 上预装）。

sentences.en: The installer is about 5 MB and installs per-user, no admin rights required.
sentences.zh: 安装程序大约 5 MB，按用户安装，无需管理员权限。

blocks.html_en: Skim is deliberately small: a fast, keyboard-first Windows email client with a native Rust core instead of Electron, offline-first actions, instant local search, and an AI copilot that works with your own key. No calendar, no rules engine, no bloat.

sentences.en: Skim is deliberately small: a fast, keyboard-first Windows email client with a native Rust core instead of Electron, offline-first actions, instant local search, and an AI copilot that works with your own key.
sentences.zh: Skim 故意做得很小：一个快速、键盘优先的 Windows 电子邮件客户端，具有本机 Rust 核心而不是 Electron、离线优先操作、即时本地搜索以及使用您自己的密钥工作的 AI 副驾驶。

sentences.en: No calendar, no rules engine, no bloat.
sentences.zh: 没有日历，没有规则引擎，没有臃肿。

blocks.html_en: Yes. Mail syncs over IMAP straight into a local SQLite cache on your device, so Skim works offline and search is instant. There are no Skim servers and zero telemetry.

sentences.en: Yes.
sentences.zh: 是的。

sentences.en: Mail syncs over IMAP straight into a local SQLite cache on your device, so Skim works offline and search is instant.
sentences.zh: 邮件通过 IMAP 直接同步到设备上的本地 SQLite 缓存中，因此 Skim 可以离线工作并且搜索是即时的。

sentences.en: There are no Skim servers and zero telemetry.
sentences.zh: 没有 Skim 服务器和零遥测。

content_html_zh:
Skim
Features AI Install FAQ GitHub

// 免费 · 开源 · ~5MB · WINDOWS · BYOK //

一个免费的 Windows 人工智能电子邮件客户端，并不糟糕（那么难）

——摘自日记，凌晨 2 点左右

极简、原生、快速。 BYOK 适用于 AI 助理和合著者。 无需订阅——永久免费。 开源。

免费和开源 · ~5 MB 安装程序 · 无管理员权限 · 获取 Skim_x.y.z_x64-setup.exe

▶ 观察它的移动

更少的按钮。 减少疼痛。

电子邮件客户端通常有两种类型：作为应用程序的浏览器，或者带有 ICQ 时代氛围的万能套件。 撇脂都不是。

原生，非 Chromium

带有系统 WebView2 UI 的 Rust 核心——没有像 Electron 这样的捆绑浏览器。 安装程序只有几兆字节，冷启动是即时的，空闲内存适中。 无需管理员权限即可安装。

我们削减了一半的功能。 故意。

没有日历、没有联系人管理器、没有规则、没有过滤器、没有暂停——没有任何东西是你从未实际使用过的。 更少的按钮意味着更少的认知负荷意味着更少的刺激。 需要一个万能套件吗？ 安装 Outlook。

当您需要时，操作就会出现

按钮仅在有用时才会出现。 根本没有菜单栏。 Skim 的全部工作就是在正确的时刻采取正确的行动。 它的效果如何还有待商榷——但你可以提供帮助！

默认为本地和私有

邮件通过 IMAP 直接同步到本地 SQLite 数据库。 它可以离线工作，搜索是即时的 (FTS5)，并且每个操作都会立即应用并排队 - 当网络恢复时，Skim 会赶上。 零遥测，零肛门探针。

>_ 一个热键可实现任何操作

Ctrl+K，就已经完成了

一个热键即可完成任何操作。 搜索您的邮件，跳转到任何文件夹，发出快速命令，并询问整个邮箱中的人工智能——一个窗口，无需鼠标。

无需鼠标 →

Ctrl K 调色板 Ctrl N 撰写 j/k 移动 e 存档 # 删除 s 星标 u 未读 r 回复/搜索

电子邮件并未消亡。

✦ 你的钥匙，你的账单

人工智能知道今天是星期四并像您一样写作

没有、也永远不会有“Skim Pro”订阅。 粘贴您自己的 Anthropic (Claude) 或 OpenRouter 密钥（Claude、GPT、Gemini、Grok 和数百个模型），或者将 Skim 指向任何 OpenAI 兼容端点，包括通过 Ollama、LM Studio 或 vLLM 的本地模型，然后紫色 ✦ 按钮就会活跃起来。 请求直接从您的机器发送到提供商——没有我们的代理，没有标记。 您按成本向提供商付款；密钥位于 Windows 凭据管理器中。 没有钥匙？ Skim 只是一个快速的电子邮件客户端（并不令人惊奇，但为什么不呢？）。

  • [01]用您的声音草稿 - 告诉它要说什么，然后收到一封完成的第一人称电子邮件。 Skim 可以分析多达一百条您发送的消息，并按照您的书写方式进行书写：相同的问候语、句子长度、标点符号。 它会以发件人的语言进行回复，即使您不会说这种语言。
  • [02]你在对话中完善的草稿——“更短”、“添加截止日期”、“去掉感叹号”。 每个调整都会针对当前文本，保留您未要求更改的所有内容。 手动编辑，人工智能也会考虑到这一点。
  • [03]询问一封电子邮件 - 关于一条消息或整个线程（上下文中最多 25 封电子邮件）的问题，以及后续问题。 它仅根据内容进行回答：如果答案不在对话中，它就会这么说。
  • [04]聊聊你的整个邮箱——“这个月还有哪些发票未付？” 就在命令面板中。 Skim 会搜索您的邮件 (FTS5/bm25)、答案，并将源电子邮件引用为可点击的筹码。
  • [05]人工智能回顾您的未读邮件 — 一键摘要最多 20 封未读电子邮件：首先需要回复的邮件，包含截止日期和引用的来源，时事通讯堆放在一边。 它将所涵盖的内容标记为已读。
  • [06]它知道上下文 - 每个提示都包含当前日期、工作日、时间和您的时区、您的界面语言，以及相关的整个线程。 因此，“回复说我会在周五之前完成”就变成了一个具体的日期，而不是一个抽象的日期。

叉它，打破它，重复

Skim 在 MIT 许可下发布 - 开源，您可以随心所欲地使用。 发现错误或有想法？ 打开一个问题。 更好的是，只需发送拉取请求即可。

几秒钟内即可安装

下载最新的安装程序 — .exe (NSIS) 按用户安装，无需管理员权限； .msi 是针对托管环境发布的。 需要带有 WebView2 的 Windows 10/11（Windows 11 上预装）。

↓ 获取最新版本

常见问题

人们在切换 Windows 电子邮件客户端之前通常会询问的所有问题。

Is this whole thing vibe-coded?

是的，显然。 现在是 2026 年——醒醒吧，武士！ 没有人再手工编写代码了。

Is Skim free?

是的。 Skim 是在 MIT 许可下免费且开源的——无需订阅、无需帐户、无需追加销售。 AI 功能是可选的，并且使用您自己的 API 密钥，因此您可以直接按成本向 AI 提供商付费。

Which email providers does Skim support?

Gmail（一键式 Google 登录或应用程序密码）、通过应用程序密码的 Outlook、Yahoo 和 iCloud，以及通过标准 IMAP/SMTP 的任何其他邮箱。 大型提供商的服务器设置会自动填写。

Does the AI read my email?

仅当您要求时。 AI 功能将保持关闭状态，直到您粘贴自己的密钥（Anthropic、OpenRouter 或任何 OpenAI 兼容端点（包括通过 Ollama、LM Studio 或 vLLM 的本地模型）），并且每个请求都直接从您的计算机发送到提供商，无需中间人服务器。 密钥存储在 Windows 凭据管理器中。

Does Skim run on Windows 10 and Windows 11?

是 - Skim 支持带有 WebView2 的 Windows 10 和 11（Windows 11 上预装）。 安装程序大约 5 MB，按用户安装，无需管理员权限。

How is Skim different from Outlook or Thunderbird?

Skim 故意做得很小：一个快速、键盘优先的 Windows 电子邮件客户端，具有本机 Rust 核心而不是 Electron、离线优先操作、即时本地搜索以及使用您自己的密钥工作的 AI 副驾驶。 没有日历，没有规则引擎，没有臃肿。

Is my email stored locally?

是的。 邮件通过 IMAP 直接同步到设备上的本地 SQLite 缓存中，因此 Skim 可以离线工作并且搜索是即时的。 没有 Skim 服务器和零遥测。
